metaDescription: Facing criminal charges in Lancaster? Farris Law offers personalized defense strategies to protect your rights. Call us for expert legal representation today!
contentHtml:
Farris Law Firm is here to help you regain control when criminal charges threaten your future. With personalized legal strategies shaped around the details of your situation, we aim to protect your rights and guide you through this uncertain time.

Facing a felony or misdemeanor can feel overwhelming, but you don’t have to face it alone. Take a confident first step by contacting our law firm online or calling (818) 861-0861 to speak with a Lancaster criminal defense lawyer today.

Why Choose Our Criminal Defense Lawyers in Lancaster?

Every case is unique, and at Farris Law Firm, we begin by listening to the story. 

Criminal charges can bring doubt and fear. We believe in creating peace of mind through open communication and hands-on support. From your first meeting with us, you’ll know exactly where your case stands and what to expect moving forward.

Unlike other criminal defense law firms in Southern California, we dedicate the time necessary to fully understand your case. Maintaining a manageable caseload gives every client the care and tailored defense they deserve.

Our experience in Lancaster and throughout Southern California gives us a grounded perspective on the legal system, offering practical solutions when they matter most.

If you’re ready to take the next step in defending your future, contact us today.

Criminal Cases We Handle in Lancaster, CA

Farris Law Firm provides support and representation for a wide range of criminal charges. A Lancaster criminal defense lawyer from our team can help with cases such as:

  • Drug Offenses
  • Driving Under the Influence (DUI)
  • Shoplifting
  • Vandalism
  • Robbery
  • Burglary
  • Break-ins
  • Weapons Charges
  • Expungements
  • Civil Restraining Orders 
  • Domestic Violence Offenses

No matter the severity of the charges or accusations, we are committed to exploring every angle of your case and working hard to achieve the best possible outcome.

What Is at Risk When Facing Criminal Charges?

Criminal charges can significantly impact every aspect of your life. From immediate consequences to long-term effects, understanding what’s at stake can help you see why taking action quickly is important.

Challenges you may face include:

  • Loss of Liberty: A conviction could involve jail time or probation, disrupting your life and plans.
  • Financial Strain: Criminal cases often lead to fines, court fees, and lasting financial burdens.
  • Career Obstacles: Depending on the outcome, professional licenses or job prospects may be at risk.
  • Reputational Damage: Even unfounded charges can harm personal and professional relationships.
  • Driving Restrictions: Charges like DUIs often result in license suspensions that limit your independence.

The choices you make now can influence your future in significant ways. Our team is here to help you understand your options and build a defense designed to protect what matters most to you.

How Do Criminal Proceedings Work?

While every case is different, the process of navigating the criminal justice system in Lancaster typically follows these steps:

  • Arrest and Booking: Law enforcement makes an arrest and processes you into the system, taking photos and fingerprints.
  • Arraignment: You will officially respond to the charges at this first court hearing by entering a plea.
  • Pre-Trial Phase: This stage involves gathering evidence, reviewing the prosecution’s case, filing motions, and possibly negotiating plea agreements.
  • Trial: If no resolution is reached, your case will go to trial for a judge or jury to decide the outcome.
  • Sentencing: If convicted, the court will impose penalties that may include incarceration, fines, or probation.

No matter where you are in this process, having a clear plan can make all the difference. Our Lancaster criminal defense lawyers are here to help you every step of the way, offering comprehensive legal guidance that fights for your freedom.

Lancaster Criminal Defense Lawyer FAQs

How does hiring a lawyer help my criminal case?

Working with a lawyer helps protect your rights throughout the legal process. From negotiating with prosecutors to preparing for trial, an attorney can identify the best approaches for your case.

Is expungement an option after a conviction?

Expungement is possible for certain cases in California. Still, eligibility depends on several factors, including the type of charge and whether you met all court requirements. It’s worth exploring this option with a Lancaster criminal defense attorney to see if you qualify.

Do most cases go to trial?

Not necessarily. Many criminal cases are resolved through plea agreements or alternative resolutions. However, every case is unique, and your lawyer can discuss all available paths.

What happens if I’m facing DUI charges in Lancaster?

Lancaster courts take DUI charges seriously, often resulting in steep fines, potential jail time, and license suspensions. A defense may focus on challenging evidence like breath test results or seeking reduced charges.

Can false accusations affect my case?

False accusations can complicate a case, but gathering evidence quickly and managing your statements carefully can help address misunderstandings. A strong legal defense can work to correct misrepresentations and ensure your voice is heard.

About Farris Law Firm

Farris Law Firm was founded to create a reliable, local option for criminal defense that treats clients with dignity. Charles and Beatrice Farris launched the practice to serve communities like Lancaster, offering a hands-on approach and personal attention that many larger firms cannot provide.

Located near key courthouses in the area, the firm stays deeply connected to the legal landscape in Lancaster. Strong relationships with judges, court staff, and prosecutors allow the Farris Law Firm to understand how the system works and position clients for victory in their case.

With a focus on honest assessments and strategic planning, the team avoids overpromising while remaining committed to delivering the highest level of legal guidance.

At Farris Law Firm, you’ll receive more than a simple lawyer—you’ll find a team that values clear communication and a commitment to protecting your future.

Protect Your Rights with Farris Law Firm Criminal Defense Lawyers in Lancaster

Taking control of your defense early can make a life-changing difference when faced with a criminal charge. Farris Law Firm is here to help you respond decisively, challenging the obstacles ahead so you can focus on a brighter future.
